[Financial Legal Risks and Prevention Mec]
摘要: This study examines critical financial legal challenges in cross-border mergers and acquisitions (M&A) within the context of increasing global economic integration. Through multi-jurisdictional case analysis and comparative legal research, it reveals systemic vulnerabilities stemming from regulatory disparities, financing constraints, and currency volatility across different legal frameworks.
